skip_reason: The bookmarklet requires a 'csrftoken' cookie (i.e. being logged in to Instagram) and immediately alerts 'Not logged in to Instagram' and returns if it's missing. It then calls Instagram's authenticated GraphQL endpoint to page through all of a user's posts. Cannot be exercised in unauthenticated headless CI.
notes: Active - V9 page modifier. On an Instagram user profile page, shows a status badge, then paginates through the user's posts via Instagram's internal GraphQL API (doc_id: 24835958312750138) using the csrftoken cookie. Builds a map of post code -> taken_at timestamp, then overlays '.ig-ts-v9' divs with ISO+local timestamps on each post thumbnail link. Adds a '.myosint-v9-badge' attribution badge. 🚨 flag if post is within 7 days old.
